title: Stereoselective Synthesis of 2-Deoxyglycosides via Thioglycoside Donors
glycan_or_substrate_notes: 2-deoxyglycoside; neighbouring group participation from 2-O-benzoyl; galactose acceptor
supporting_chunks: Treatment of donor 3a with acceptor 5b in the presence of NIS/TfOH in CH2Cl2 at -20 °C for 2 h afforded disaccharide 6c in 78% yield as the β-anomer exclusively.
Procedure B: General glycosylation procedure. ... NIS (1.5 equiv) ... TfOH (0.1 equiv) ... CH2Cl2 ... -20 °C ... 2 h ...
